title: Developing a Buyer Persona for a Tech Startup
scenario: Create a buyer persona for a 28-year-old software developer named Jamie. Jamie is responsible for purchasing software solutions for her company and is looking for innovative tools that can help her team work more efficiently. Describe Jamie's demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors in a concise and detailed way. Use a format that includes sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors. Keep the description under 250 words.
constraints: Must use a format with sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the buyer persona adhere to the format and word limit requirements?
Is the buyer persona clear and easy to understand?
Does the buyer persona include all necessary information about the target buyer?
